seller.name_zh: LUQ LABS 有限责任公司
seller.jurisdiction_zh: 一家依据美国加利福尼亚州法律设立并存续的有限责任公司
seller.description: AI software products for cross-border B2B customers (CitizenReady AI, RentalNote, WealthRank, Ten Thousand Suns).

terms.payment_en: Payment in USD via Stripe invoice; international wire transfer available (recommended for orders over USD 50,000).
terms.payment_zh: 以美元通过 Stripe 账单支付;亦可采用国际电汇(订单金额超过 50,000 美元时建议使用电汇)。
terms.legal_en: Any resulting agreement is governed by the laws of the State of California, USA (CISG excluded). Disputes are resolved by arbitration administered by HKIAC, seated in Hong Kong. The Chinese-language version of the executed contract is the sole authoritative text; English text is a courtesy translation.
terms.legal_zh: 由此产生的任何协议均受美国加利福尼亚州法律管辖(排除《联合国国际货物销售合同公约》适用)。争议提交香港国际仲裁中心(HKIAC)仲裁解决,仲裁地为香港。正式签署的合同以中文文本为唯一正式文本,英文文本仅为参考译文。
terms.tax_note_en: LUQ LABS is a US company and cannot issue Chinese VAT fapiao; a US invoice and W-8BEN-E form are provided for cross-border tax filing.
terms.tax_note_zh: LUQ LABS 为美国公司,无法开具中国增值税发票;我方将提供美国形式发票及 W-8BEN-E 表格,供贵方办理对外支付税务备案。

catalog.description_en: AI-powered citizenship & immigration prep platform, enterprise seat license, annual.
catalog.description_zh: AI 驱动的入籍与移民备考平台,企业席位年度许可。

catalog.name_zh: CitizenReady AI 部署与集成服务
catalog.description_en: One-time onboarding: SSO integration, admin training, data import.
catalog.description_zh: 一次性部署服务:单点登录集成、管理员培训、数据导入。

catalog.name_zh: RentalNote 物业 SaaS 订阅
catalog.description_en: Rental management SaaS, billed per managed property, annual subscription.
catalog.description_zh: 租赁管理 SaaS,按管理物业数量计费,年度订阅。

catalog.description_en: Wealth scoring & ranking API access, billed per 10,000 calls.
catalog.description_zh: 财富评分与排名 API 访问,按每一万次调用计费。

catalog.name_zh: Ten Thousand Suns 内容授权
catalog.description_en: Interactive content title license, per title, annual.
catalog.description_zh: 互动内容作品授权,按作品计,年度。

catalog.description_en: Senior engineer custom development, per person-day.
catalog.description_zh: 资深工程师定制开发,按人天计。

catalog.description_en: Priority support, 8x5 PT business hours, dedicated channel, annual plan.
catalog.description_zh: 优先支持,太平洋时间工作日 8x5,专属沟通渠道,年度计划。
